descEn: Classic Indonesian fried rice with sunny-side up egg and chicken satay.
descId: Nasi goreng klasik Indonesia dengan telur mata sapi dan sate ayam.

descEn: Sweet rice cake balls filled with molten palm sugar and coated in grated coconut.
descId: Kue beras manis berisi gula aren cair dan dibalut parutan kelapa.
steps: Mix flour, water, and pandan paste to form dough
Form small balls and fill with palm sugar

descEn: Slow-cooked beef in coconut milk and spices until dry and tender.
descId: Daging sapi yang dimasak perlahan dalam santan dan rempah-rempah hingga kering dan empuk.
steps: Simmer slowly until liquid evaporates and meat is tender

descEn: Grilled chicken skewers served with a rich peanut sauce.
descId: Sate ayam bakar yang disajikan dengan saus kacang yang kaya rasa.
steps: Cut chicken into cubes and marinate
Blend peanuts with garlic and sweet soy sauce to make sauce

descEn: Yellow spicy chicken soup with vermicelli, boiled egg, and cabbage.
descId: Sup ayam bumbu kuning pedas dengan bihun, telur rebus, dan kubis.
steps: Sauté blended spices (turmeric, garlic, shallots) and add to broth
Assemble vermicelli, cabbage, and chicken in a bowl
Pour hot broth over and top with boiled egg

descEn: Indonesian salad of slightly boiled, blanched or steamed vegetables and hard-boiled eggs, boiled potato, fried tofu and tempeh, served with a peanut sauce dressing.
descId: Salad sayuran rebus, telur rebus, kentang rebus, tahu dan tempe goreng, disajikan dengan saus kacang.
steps: Mix all ingredients with peanut sauce
